title: App Settings - General - About - UI
scenario: About tab is not displayed under General settings in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) icon to open the side navigation menu.
3. Tap "General" to open the General settings screen.
4. Verify that the "About" tab is present on the General settings screen.
expected: The "About" tab is displayed on the General settings screen, matching the Figma design.
